text:
There once was an old bookshelf that stood in an old kitchen. Every book inside told a story. One day a girl named Lucy came looking for a book that hadn't a story. That book was about a wise old owl. The owl had a pet worm named Olive.

Olive had dreams. One dream was of the sun setting behind pine trees. Every morning the owl woke Olive with a kiss on its head. They had adventures. They danced under the moonlight under the pine trees.

The owl wanted Olive to live forever. It felt something deep inside itself.

One night, while Olive lay sleepy on the grass, the owl had a dream. In Dreamland, it was as if everything was alive—it sang. Olive sang too. Together they sang songs.

They lived forever, just the owl and Olive. Every day they listened to their own songs. The owl taught Olive how to fly better. They visited every leafy branch they'd ever wanted to explore.

One evening, just
